00858| 00859| filterButtons.forEach(button => { 00860| button.addEventListener('click', function() { 00861| const selectedPeriod = this.textContent.toLowerCase(); 00862| 00863| if (selectedPeriod === currentPeriod) { 00864| return; 00865| } 00866| 00867| filterButtons.forEach(btn => btn.classList.remove('active')); 00868| this.classList.add('active'); 00869| 00870| currentPeriod = selectedPeriod; 00871| 00872| updateDateDisplay(selectedPeriod); 00873| 00874| refreshDashboard(); 00875| }); 00876| }); 00877| } 00878| 00879| function updateDateDisplay(period) { 00880| const dateElement = document.getElementById('currentDate'); 00881| if (!dateElement) return; 00882| 00883| const now = new Date(); 00884| 00885| switch(period) { 00886| case 'today': 00887| dateElement.textContent = now.toLocaleDateString('en-US', { 00888| weekday: 'long', 00889| month: 'long', 00890| day: 'numeric' 00891| }); 00892| break; 00893| case 'month': 00894| dateElement.textContent = now.toLocaleDateString('en-US', { 00895| month: 'long', 00896| year: 'numeric' 00897| }); 00898| break; 00899| case 'year': 00900| dateElement.textContent = now.toLocaleDateString('en-US', { 00901| year: 'numeric' 00902| }); 00903| break; 00904| default: 00905| dateElement.textContent = now.toLocaleDateString('en-US', { 00906| month: 'long', 00907| year: 'numeric' 00908| }); 00909| } 00910| } 00911| 00912| // ==================== INITIALIZATION ==================== 00913| 00914| async function refreshDashboard() { 00915| console.log('=== REFRESHING DASHBOARD FOR PERIOD:', currentPeriod); 00916| 00917| updateDateDisplay(currentPeriod); 00918| 00919| showLoadingStates(); 00920| 00921| try { 00922| await fetchElectricityData(); 00923| await fetchSavingsData(); 00924| console.log('=== DASHBOARD REFRESHED ==='); 00925| } catch (error) { 00926| console.error('Error refreshing dashboard:', error); 00927| } finally { 00928| hideLoadingStates(); 00929| } 00930| } 00931| 00932| function showLoadingStates() { 00933| document.querySelectorAll('.filter-btn').forEach(btn => { 00934| btn.classList.add('loading'); 00935| }); 00936| 00937| const loadingElements = ['wastedAmount', 'savedAmount', 'netSavings', 'totalCost', 'usageTillNow', 'usagePredicted']; 00938| loadingElements.forEach(id => { 00939| const element = document.getElementById(id); 00940| if (element) element.textContent = 'Loading...'; 00941| }); 00942| } 00943| 00944| function hideLoadingStates() { 00945| document.querySelectorAll('.filter-btn').forEach(btn => { 00946| btn.classList.remove('loading'); 00947| }); 00948| } 00949| 00950| // ==================== LIGHT/DARK THEME TOGGLE ==================== 00951| 00952| function setupThemeToggle() { 00953| const themeToggle = document.getElementById('themeToggle'); 00954| if (!themeToggle) return; 00955| 00956| const isDark = localStorage.getItem('theme') !== 'light'; 00957| updateTheme(isDark); 00958| 00959| themeToggle.addEventListener('click', function() { 00960| const isCurrentlyDark = document.body.getAttribute('data-theme') === 'dark'; 00961| const newIsDark = !isCurrentlyDark; 00962| updateTheme(newIsDark); 00963| localStorage.setItem('theme', newIsDark ? 'dark' : 'light'); 00964| }); 00965| } 00966| 00967| function updateTheme(isDark) { 00968| const root = document.documentElement; 00969| const body = document.body; 00970| const themeIcon = document.querySelector('.theme-icon'); 00971| 00972| if (isDark) { 00973| root.style.setProperty('--bg-primary', '#1a2332'); 00974| root.style.setProperty('--bg-secondary', '#243447'); 00975| root.style.setProperty('--bg-card', '#2a3f5f'); 00976| root.style.setProperty('--text-primary', '#ffffff'); 00977| root.style.setProperty('--text-secondary', '#b0c4de'); 00978| root.style.setProperty('--accent-teal', '#4ecdc4'); 00979| root.style.setProperty('--accent-yellow', '#ffd166'); 00980| root.style.setProperty('--accent-pink', '#ff6b9d'); 00981| root.style.setProperty('--accent-purple', '#c77dff'); 00982| root.style.setProperty('--accent-green', '#06ffa5'); 00983| root.style.setProperty('--accent-red', '#ff4757'); 00984| root.style.setProperty('--border-color', '#3d5a80'); 00985| body.setAttribute('data-theme', 'dark'); 00986| if (themeIcon) themeIcon.textContent = '🌙'; 00987| } else { 00988| root.style.setProperty('--bg-primary', '#f5f7fa'); 00989| root.style.setProperty('--bg-secondary', '#e8ecf1'); 00990| root.style.setProperty('--bg-card', '#ffffff'); 00991| root.style.setProperty('--text-primary', '#1a2332'); 00992| root.style.setProperty('--text-secondary', '#5a6a7a'); 00993| root.style.setProperty('--accent-teal', '#20b2aa'); 00994| root.style.setProperty('--accent-yellow', '#f0c040'); 00995| root.style.setProperty('--accent-pink', '#e85a7d'); 00996| root.style.setProperty('--accent-purple', '#9b59b6'); 00997| root.style.setProperty('--accent-green', '#2ecc71'); 00998| root.style.setProperty('--accent-red', '#e74c3c'); 00999| root.style.setProperty('--border-color', '#d0d7de'); 01000| body.setAttribute('data-theme', 'light'); 01001| if (themeIcon) themeIcon.textContent = '☀️'; 01002| } 01003| } 01004| 01005| window.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', () => { 01006| console.log('=== ECOTRACK DASHBOARD INITIALIZED ==='); 01007| 01008| setupThemeToggle(); 01009| setupTabSwitching(); 01010| setupTimeFilters(); 01011| 01012| refreshDashboard(); 01013| 01014| setInterval(refreshDashboard, REFRESH_INTERVAL); 01015| 01016| window.debugSavings = () => { 01017| console.log('=== MANUAL SAVINGS UPDATE ===');
